name: Thai Steak Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 oz boneless top round beef steak, 1-inch thick, trimmed
8 cups loosely packed mixed salad greens
1 piece ginger, 1-1/2-inch piece, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat broiler and broiler-pan rack or BBQ grill.
2. Broil or grill steak 4-6 inches from heat source. Grill for 5-7 minutes per side for rare, 7-9 minutes per side for medium, and 9-11 minutes per side for well done. Remove to cutting board; let stand about 5 minutes.
3. Place lettuce, cucumber, radishes, scallions, and cilantro in a large bowl.
4. Put dressing ingredients in a blender or food processor and process until smooth.
5. Cut steak into thin slices across the grain; add to the bowl.
6. Pour dressing over salad.
7. Toss to mix and coat.
